summary_one_line: Profile-class/colorspace FOURCC bytes at offsets 0x0c-0x13 that route reading into the float-devicelink tag path, calling cmsPipelineDup with a NULL tag.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Profile-header FOURCC bytes at offsets 0x0c-0x13 (device-class signature + colorspace) set to a value that makes cmsIsTag(hProfile, tagFloat) true, so _cmsReadFloatDevicelinkTag runs and invokes cmsPipelineDup(cmsReadTag(hProfile, tagFloat)); when that float tag read returns NULL, the blocker's TRUE side (lut == NULL) is taken.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner seeds carry varied non-monitor class signatures at 0x0c-0x13 (e.g. 'abst', 'link', 'MCH6'/'MCH9') and the W overlay uniquely hits the float-tag caller _cmsReadFloatDevicelinkTag at cmsio1.c:665-667; on the call chain the winner takes the TRUE side of 'if (cmsIsTag(hProfile, tagFloat))' (W T=2 F=0) and then reaches L1461 with T=10 F=0.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Every loser seed holds the constant 'mntr'/'RGB ' (monitor RGB) FOURCC at 0x0c-0x13, never satisfying the float-tag predicate (L cmsIsTag(tagFloat) T=0 F=30); the loser instead reaches cmsPipelineDup with a non-NULL lut and takes the FALSE side at L1461 (L T=0 F=40), proceeding into the duplication loop.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile; the cmsIsTag/tag-table comparisons against the float-devicelink tag signature and the profile-class checks are equality CMPs whose comparands are logged by CmpLogObserver and spliced into the matching input bytes, letting vpc synthesize the exact FOURCC that routes into the float path. value_profile only buckets comparison distance but never performs the I2SRandReplace substitution of the literal, so it cannot land the discrete signature.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is cmsPipelineDup's lut == NULL early-return and the globally blocked (winning) side is the TRUE branch.
The winner takes the TRUE side of the blocker while the loser takes the FALSE side.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L1461  T=10 F=0  T=0 F=40  if (lut == NULL) return NULL;  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: The TRUE side is reached through the float-devicelink caller that calls cmsPipelineDup with the float tag read, hit only by the winner.
On the call chain the winner takes the float-tag TRUE side and the loser does not.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=2   L 343  T=2 F=0  T=0 F=30  if (cmsIsTag(hProfile, tagFloat)) {  // Float tag takes p...

evidence_trail.claim: Loser seeds all carry the constant monitor-RGB class FOURCC at offsets 0x0c onward.
Winner seeds carry varied non-monitor class signatures at offsets 0x0c-0x13.
Offsets 0x0c-0x13 are exactly where winner and loser byte sets diverge with concentrated values.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile, enabling literal substitution of logged CMP comparands.
value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and only buckets CMP distance, so it cannot substitute discrete literals.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2205 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 919baa2a1e414014` and observed an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 3 of the 4-level ancestor chain; two other winning vpc seeds (3311d5cc979f8c58, 100ba381c3e6ccb8) also report the dash-row floor signal.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on cmsIsTag(tagFloat) where value_profile resolves the float-tag path as fast as value_profile_cmplog (no I2S advantage), or where vpc resolves it with the monitor-RGB 'mntr'/'RGB ' bytes left unchanged at 0x0c-0x13.

weakest_evidence_point: The byte-diff shows class-signature divergence at 0x0c-0x13 but does not directly prove those exact bytes are the comparand cmsIsTag compares against the float-devicelink tag signature versus merely correlating with the float path.
